info.title: nbeauty2
info.description: Move a .NET Framework/.NET Core app runtime components and dependencies into a sub-directory and make it beauty.

options.name: -apphostdir
options.description: [.NET Core Non Single-File App Only] relative path based on beautyDir.

options.name: -apphostentry
options.description: [.NET Core Non Single-File App Only] patch apphost entry location.

options.name: -enabledebug
options.description: [.NET Core App Only] allow 3rd debuggers(like dnSpy) debugs the app

options.name: -gitcdn
options.description:
[.NET Core App Only] specify a HostFXRPatcher mirror repo if you have troble in connecting github.
RECOMMEND https://gitee.com/liesauer/HostFXRPatcher for mainland china users.

options.name: -gittree
options.description:
[.NET Core App Only] specify to a valid git branch or any bits commit hash(up to 40) to grab the specific artifacts and won't get updates any more.
default is master, means that you always use the latest artifacts.
NOTE: please provide as longer commit hash as you can, otherwise it may can not be determined as a valid unique commit hash.

options.name: -hiddens
options.description: dlls that end users never needed, so hide them.

options.name: -loglevel
options.description:
log level. valid values: Error/Detail/Info
Error: Log errors only.
Detail: Log useful infos.
Info: Log everything.
(default "Error")

options.name: -nbloaderverpolicy
options.description:
loader versioning policy, see https://github.com/nulastudio/NetBeauty2/issues/65 for more details.
(default "auto")

options.name: -noruntimeinfo
options.description: [.NET Core App Only] keep the runtime info in deps.json or not

options.name: -roll-forward
options.description: override default roll-forward behavior, see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/versions/selection#control-roll-forward-behavior for more details.

options.name: -srmode
options.description: [.NET Core App Only] share the runtime between apps

options.name: -usepatch
options.description: [.NET Core App Only] use the patched hostfxr to reduce files

arguments.name: EXCLUDES
arguments.description: dlls that no need to be moved, multi-dlls separated with ";". Example: dll1.dll;lib*;...

arguments.name: EXCLUDES
arguments.description: dlls that no need to be moved, multi-dlls separated with ";". Example: dll1.dll;lib*;...
